'''鈭歝h-th-f''' ('''kachathaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pejorize|pejorize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-th-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pejorize|pejorize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-th-f
|-
! Lemma
| kachathaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichathaf|thichathaf]] || [[word:jichathaf|jichathaf]] || [[word:shichathaf|shichathaf]] || [[word:kichathaf|kichathaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchathaf|thuthuchathaf]] || [[word:jujuchathaf|jujuchathaf]] || [[word:shushuchathaf|shushuchathaf]] || [[word:kukuchathaf|kukuchathaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchathaf|thuchathaf]] || [[word:juchathaf|juchathaf]] || [[word:shuchathaf|shuchathaf]] || [[word:kuchathaf|kuchathaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchathaf|thuchathaf]] || [[word:juchathaf|juchathaf]] || [[word:shuchathaf|shuchathaf]] || [[word:kuchathaf|kuchathaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechathaf|thechathaf]] || [[word:jechathaf|jechathaf]] || [[word:shechathaf|shechathaf]] || [[word:kechathaf|kechathaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochathaf|thothochathaf]] || [[word:jojochathaf|jojochathaf]] || [[word:shoshochathaf|shoshochathaf]] || [[word:kokochathaf|kokochathaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochathaf|thochathaf]] || [[word:jochathaf|jochathaf]] || [[word:shochathaf|shochathaf]] || [[word:kochathaf|kochathaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochathaf|thochathaf]] || [[word:jochathaf|jochathaf]] || [[word:shochathaf|shochathaf]] || [[word:kochathaf|kochathaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chathaf|chathaf]] || [[word:chathaf|chathaf]] || [[word:chathaf|chathaf]] || [[word:chathaf|chathaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chathaf|chathaf]] || [[word:chathaf|chathaf]] || [[word:chathaf|chathaf]] || [[word:chathaf|chathaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chathaf|chathaf]] || [[word:chathaf|chathaf]] || [[word:chathaf|chathaf]] || [[word:chathaf|chathaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chathaf|chathaf]] || [[word:chathaf|chathaf]] || [[word:chathaf|chathaf]] || [[word:chathaf|chathaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chathaf|th忙chathaf]] || [[word:j忙chathaf|j忙chathaf]] || [[word:sh忙chathaf|sh忙chathaf]] || [[word:k忙chathaf|k忙chathaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachathaf|thathachathaf]] || [[word:jajachathaf|jajachathaf]] || [[word:shashachathaf|shashachathaf]] || [[word:kakachathaf|kakachathaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachathaf|thachathaf]] || [[word:jachathaf|jachathaf]] || [[word:shachathaf|shachathaf]] || [[word:kachathaf|kachathaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachathaf|thachathaf]] || [[word:jachathaf|jachathaf]] || [[word:shachathaf|shachathaf]] || [[word:kachathaf|kachathaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachathaf|shachathaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachathaf|goshachathaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachathaf|gokishachathaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachathafn眉|shachathafn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachathafnkn眉|goshachathafnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachathafn眉|gokishachathafn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachathafsh毛|shachathafsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachathafnksh毛|goshachathafnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachathafsh毛|gokishachathafsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachathafro|shachathafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachathafnkro|goshachathafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachathafro|gokishachathafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachathafmu|shachathafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachathafnkmu|goshachathafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachathafmu|gokishachathafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachathafsher|shachathafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachathafnksher|goshachathafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachathafsher|gokishachathafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachathafng|shachathafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachathafnkng|goshachathafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachathafng|gokishachathafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachathafya|shachathafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachathafnkya|goshachathafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachathafya|gokishachathafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachathafyam|shachathafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachathafnkyam|goshachathafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachathafyam|gokishachathafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachathafn眉sh毛|shachathafn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachathafnkn眉sh毛|goshachathafnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachathafn眉sh毛|gokishachathafn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachathafn眉ro|shachathafn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachathafnkn眉ro|goshachathafnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachathafn眉ro|gokishachathafn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachathafn眉mu|shachathafn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachathafnkn眉mu|goshachathafnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachathafn眉mu|gokishachathafn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachathafsh毛n眉|shachathafsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachathafnksh毛n眉|goshachathafnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachathafsh毛n眉|gokishachathafsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachathafsh毛ro|shachathafsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachathafnksh毛ro|goshachathafnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachathafsh毛ro|gokishachathafsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachathafsh毛mu|shachathafsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachathafnksh毛mu|goshachathafnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachathafsh毛mu|gokishachathafsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachathafron眉|shachathafron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachathafnkron眉|goshachathafnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachathafron眉|gokishachathafron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachathafrosh毛|shachathafrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachathafnkrosh毛|goshachathafnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachathafrosh毛|gokishachathafrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachathafromu|shachathafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachathafnkromu|goshachathafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachathafromu|gokishachathafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachathafmun眉|shachathafmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachathafnkmun眉|goshachathafnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachathafmun眉|gokishachathafmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachathafmush毛|shachathafmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachathafnkmush毛|goshachathafnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachathafmush毛|gokishachathafmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachathafmuro|shachathafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachathafnkmuro|goshachathafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachathafmuro|gokishachathafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
